title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a no-code calendar application using Google AI Studio and Gemini. The tutorial shows how to use advanced reasoning to extract travel itineraries and convert them into calendar invitations, with error troubleshooting and customization.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial builds a no-code calendar app in Google AI Studio that extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, using Gemini's reasoning capabilities. It walks through customizing the app to fit specific needs. The takeaway is a concrete example of assembling a working application in AI Studio without writing code, with Gemini handling the itinerary-to-invite conversion.
